static_audit_findings.inferred_from: static code inspection; not a runtime trace
static_audit_findings.split_kind_from_config: split_kind (e.g. random) comes from experiment config; time-based split is implemented in train_test_split_df but may not be used in all paths.
static_audit_findings.target_not_in_feature_lists: cited_by_count is not in feature lists in experiment configs; target is only in y.

architecture_notes: Feature building (build_feature_matrix) does not impute; preprocessor (fit on train) does.

dataset_id in metrics can come from experiment config (data.dataset_id); if experiment config points at a different dataset_name than the data config used for fetch, artifact metadata may be misleading.
audit_limitations: This audit is static/code-based. It does not verify a specific run's split or fit order at runtime.
Findings were not directly observed; they are inferred from the current codebase.
Temporal splitting is implemented in train_test_split_df but representative runs typically use random split.
